chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acq. Appeal No.S-43 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on M.A No.1770/2024 2. For hearing of main case 19-5-2025 Mr. Mumtaz Ali, Advocate for private respondent Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On 12-5-2025, following order was passed:- “None present for the appellant, nor has any intimation been received. Record reflects that even on the last date of hearing counsel for the appellant sought time for preparation but in spite of that he is called absent; the appeal is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice adjourned to 19-5-2025, to be taken up at 11:00 a.m.” Today is also the same position none present for the appellant, nor has any intimation been received, which shows that the appellant is not interested to proceed with the matter. As a result thereof, instant Crl. Acq. Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Naveed Ali
